column3: Place the blue snack pack in the top drawer then move the spice bottle from the drawer to the table and finally close the drawer
Pick up the pot lid place the pot lid on blue mat pick up the chicken leg to the pot from bowl then take out the spice bottle from the top drawer place it on the blue plate.
A chicken leg is in the pot take out the chicken leg from the pot and place it in the bowl then put the spice bottle back to the top drawer close the drawer.
